title: hieracium macilentum subsp. subvulsum
intro: Hieracium macilentum subsp. subvulsum, commonly known as the small hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium macilentum subsp. subvulsum are said to provide health benefits such as wound healing, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Hieracium macilentum subsp. subvulsum is often used as a tincture, infusion, or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
